component: On-board temperature/humidity sensor, Nano 33 BLE Sense Rev2 (HS3003)
init: HS300x.begin();   // call once in setup(); returns 1 on success, 0 on failure
gotchas: Call Serial.begin(9600) in setup(); optionally wait for the serial port.
No external wiring - the sensor is on the board.
Rev1 boards use Arduino_HTS221.h / the HTS object instead; this table targets Rev2 (HS3003).
